title: narcissus × heminalis
intro: Narcissus × hybridus, more commonly known as Narcissus × poeticus var. recurvus or Narcissus × hemionalis, is a hybrid species of daffodil, resulting from the cross between Narcissus pseudonarcissus and Narcissus poeticus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and its potential use as a treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Narcissus × heminalis include its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can help to treat respiratory infections, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of Narcissus × heminalis include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and injuries.
